title: Little Men
writer: Louisa May Alcott, Gertrude Orr, Ken Goldsmith
actors: Ralph Morgan, Erin O'Brien-Moore, Junior Durkin
plot: The former Jo March and her husband Professor Bhaer operate the Plumfield School for homeless boys. One of the boys, Nat, invites Dan, a street kid, to come to the school, where the boys are all loved and well cared for. Dan is a ...
